covered_sentences: After that she came downstairs every time Mr. Heathcliff was out.
At first she was haughty and proud towards Hareton, but gradually they made friends.
Instead of laughing at his ignorance as she had done before, Catherine began to teach him to read.
Although she still teased him about being stupid, it was now clear that she was only joking.
She liked him and wanted to help him.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 2:1 ratio. Left panel (main): mid-shot of the sitting room daytime scene; Catherine and Hareton sit side by side near the window — Catherine holds an open book toward Hareton, pointing at the page with one finger while looking at him with a warm teasing smile; Hareton leans in with earnest concentration, brow slightly furrowed. Right panel (smaller): close-up on Catherine's face in three-quarter angle, expression playful and fond — a slight teasing smirk that carries warmth, not cruelty.

Left panel: Catherine points to a line on the open book page, her other hand resting on the window sill behind; Hareton's large hands rest on his knees as he leans forward to read; their heads are tilted toward each other, very close in space. Right panel: Catherine's face fills the panel — one eyebrow raised playfully, eyes warm, the ghost of a smile on her lips; no speech bubble.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights sitting room, daytime, soft window light on the pair; they sit near the deep-set stone window, the window sill behind them; stone floor and fireplace visible at distance. Right panel: same interior ambient, close-up on Catherine's face, stone wall edge barely visible at panel margin.

Left panel: warm natural window light on both figures, soft interior shadows. Right panel: same warm light on Catherine's face, slight directional highlight from the window side.

Left panel: Catherine (C6b) — dark eyes, golden curly hair slightly disheveled, pale complexion, plain dark dress; seated, head at approximately level with Hareton's shoulder; the open book they share rests at roughly their waist height. Hareton (C5) — thick tidy deep-brown hair (梳理较整洁 — use C5b styling since context shows him now clean and well-dressed), broad wide shoulders, clean dark coat and trousers; seated, head approximately at the stone window sill upper edge height. Right panel: Catherine face fills approximately 75% of panel height.

Catherine (C6b): golden curly hair must not change, dark plain dress must not change. covered_sentences: One day, a short time after I arrived at the Heights, Catherine asked Hareton to clear some land so that she could plant flowers.
He did so with pleasure, and they spent a fine afternoon planting the flowers and admiring their work.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 1:1. Left panel: outdoor mid-shot; Catherine stands in the courtyard garden area, gesturing toward a patch of ground with one hand; Hareton stands beside her listening, facing her with a willing expression. Right panel: outdoor scene later in the afternoon — both kneeling or crouching beside a freshly planted row of flowering plants, Hareton packing soil with his large hands, Catherine holding a small plant or pointing at the finished row; both looking at each other with pleased expressions.

Left panel: Catherine gestures toward the ground with one open hand, her other hand loosely at her side; Hareton faces her attentively, chin slightly raised showing willingness; no speech bubble. Right panel: Hareton's large hands press soil around a plant; Catherine beside him crouching, holding a small flower seedling or examining the planted row; both faces turned toward each other with satisfied smiles.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights exterior courtyard, daytime, natural light; stone paving and outer wall with the main stone archway gate visible in the background; a cleared patch of ground in the mid-ground area. Right panel: same courtyard exterior, afternoon light warmer and lower; newly planted flower row in the foreground, courtyard stone wall behind, gate barely visible at the far edge.

Left panel: bright natural midday light, clear sky, stone textures in neutral grey and brown. Right panel: warmer afternoon golden light, slight shadow from the west-facing stone wall.

Left panel: Catherine (C6b) — dark eyes, golden curly hair slightly disheveled, pale complexion, plain dark dress; standing, her head at approximately Hareton's shoulder height. Hareton (C5 with C5b styling — clean tidy appearance) — thick tidy dark-brown hair, broad wide shoulders, clean dark coat; standing beside Catherine, his head is approximately two head-lengths below the stone archway gate crest. Right panel: both crouching; their heads at roughly knee height of an average standing adult; a small flowering plant in the foreground serves as a scale element (flower head approximately at their eye level when crouching).

covered_sentences: That evening at dinner, Joseph complained that they had taken a part of his fruit and vegetable garden.
He pulled out three fruit trees to plant those flowers, Joseph complained.
Did he, indeed! cried Mr. Heathcliff.
Well, tomorrow he will pull up the flowers and plant the fruit trees again.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right dialogue split, 2:1 ratio (Heathcliff's commanding response takes the main panel). Right panel (main, 2 parts): mid-shot of Heathcliff at the dinner table, rising or leaning forward with an imperious expression, one fist or hand planted on the table surface; firelight from the right side illuminates his sharp features dramatically. Left panel (1 part): Joseph — elderly, stooped, standing at the far end of the table, pointing one bony finger outward in complaint, face in a dour frown.

Right panel: Heathcliff rises from or leans over the table, posture dominant and dismissive; speech bubble above him contains: flower icon crossed out + fruit-tree outline icon, indicating he is ordering the reversal. Left panel: Joseph points one bony finger toward the viewer (toward the garden direction implied), his other hand gripping the table edge or his coat lapel; no speech bubble — his gesture of complaint is visible.

Both panels: Wuthering Heights sitting room used as dining area, evening; firelight from the right, the long table with dinner items on it, wooden chairs, stone floor; the large oak cabinet faintly visible in the background. The stone fireplace firelight is dominant; dim ambient from the window.

Warm firelight on Heathcliff's face and right side; cooler shadow on Joseph's side of the table; dark amber-orange dinner scene atmosphere.

Right panel: Heathcliff — dark-skinned adult male, black slightly disheveled short hair, black sharp eyes, tall sturdy build, dark gentleman's coat, white shirt; leaning over the table, his head at approximately twice the table height above the table surface when standing. Left panel: Joseph — white or grey sparse hair, heavily wrinkled face, short white beard, stooped posture, dark rough long coat; standing, his head noticeably lower than a standing Heathcliff due to stoop (approximately shoulder height of average adult).

covered_sentences: You have taken all my land, and all Hareton's land too.
We are entitled to a bit of land to plant flowers.
And if we want – you see, Hareton and I are friends now.
He will not do what you tell him to do now, if I don't want him to.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Horizontal triptych, three panels, left:center:right = 1:2:1. Center panel (main): mid-shot of Catherine standing upright, facing Heathcliff across the table, chin raised in defiance, eyes flashing; Heathcliff across the table facing her, his bulk dominant. Left panel: close-up of Catherine's face — fierce, indignant expression, eyebrows set in anger, head held high. Right panel: close-up of Hareton's face — conflicted, slightly alarmed, looking toward the confrontation between Catherine and Heathcliff.

Center panel: Catherine stands at the near end of the table, one hand planted on the table surface, the other gesturing outward; speech bubble above her head contains: small flower icon + two tiny stick-figure icons side by side (Catherine and Hareton as friends). Heathcliff stands at the far end, looming; no speech bubble. Left panel: Catherine's face shows righteous anger — no bubble. Right panel: Hareton's face shows tension and worry — no bubble.

All panels: Wuthering Heights sitting room, evening/dinner; firelight from the right side, the large table between Catherine and Heathcliff; stone floor, stone walls, large fireplace faintly visible at right.

Center panel: warm firelight creates a charged atmosphere, strong shadows on the table surface between the two confronting figures. Left and right panels: same interior warm amber light, face-level lighting from the fireplace side.

Left panel: Catherine (C6b) — dark eyes blazing, golden curly hair slightly disheveled, pale complexion, plain dark dress; face fills approximately 75% of panel height. Center panel: Catherine standing, head at approximately the table top plus one-head height above; Heathcliff across the table, his head clearing the table by approximately two heads (head at roughly the level of the top of the fireplace surround). Right panel: Hareton — thick tidy dark-brown hair, broad face, dark coat; face fills approximately 70% of panel height.
